domains.title: Onboarding & first-run setup
domains.rationale: All default-pack seeds were created in the scheduled state with correct attributes and log entries.

domains.title: Core data model & overview surface
domains.rationale: All documented task kinds reached the scheduled state with correct log entries.

domains.title: Habits
domains.rationale: The habit reminder fired, was marked completed, and the onComplete pipeline correctly created a scheduled output task for logging the streak.

domains.title: Routines & multi-step daily flows
domains.rationale: The final task states and pipeline links are correct, but the log entries show an out‑of‑order scheduling/completion sequence.
domains.caveat: Recap appears completed before the check‑in was even scheduled, which is inconsistent with the described journey order.

domains.title: Tasks (one-off)
domains.rationale: The task was marked completed before its scheduled trigger time, violating the one-off execution semantics.

domains.title: Goals
domains.rationale: The quiet_hours gate condition is not represented in the ScheduledTask record, violating the required watcher constraints.

domains.title: Reminders & escalation ladder
domains.rationale: The high-priority reminder did not generate the required 3-step escalation ladder tasks

domains.title: Calendar journeys
domains.rationale: The recap was correctly skipped and the 'ask later' followup was scheduled as defined.

domains.title: Inbox & email triage
domains.rationale: The task reached completed status with correct output details and logs show the expected transitions.

domains.title: Travel
domains.rationale: The approval task completed and correctly spawned the output task as scheduled, with appropriate state and log entries.

domains.title: Follow-up repair (relationships)
domains.rationale: Watcher auto-completed upon subject update as expected, with correct final state and log transitions.

domains.title: Documents, signatures, portals
domains.rationale: The reminder task never transitioned to a failed state despite the failed pipeline invocation, leaving its status incorrectly as scheduled.

domains.title: Self-control / app & website blockers
domains.rationale: The custom task fired as expected with travelActive true and logs show correct transitions.

domains.title: Group chat handoff
domains.rationale: The spine created the shadow watcher task with correct properties and logged the scheduling transition as expected.

domains.title: Multi-channel & cross-channel search
domains.rationale: The ScheduledTask record lacks the required contextRequest containing ownerFacts, recentTaskStates, and entities

domains.title: Activity signals & screen context
domains.rationale: All expected states and log transitions occurred, with auto-completion correctly recorded.

domains.title: Approval queues & action gating
domains.rationale: The approval was correctly dismissed with appropriate terminal state and log entries.

domains.title: Identity merge (canonical person)
domains.rationale: The watcher was scheduled and correctly completed after the identity merge event, with appropriate state and log entries.

domains.title: Memory recall
domains.rationale: The task was correctly created with the specified output configuration and transitioned to the scheduled state as logged.

domains.title: Connectors & permissions
domains.rationale: The followup was correctly scheduled with high priority and appropriate metadata, and the state transition log reflects the expected scheduling event.

domains.title: Health, money, screen time
domains.rationale: The watcher was created and scheduled as described, with no errors or missing terminal states.

domains.title: Push notifications
domains.rationale: The high-priority reminder was created and logged correctly with the appropriate state.

domains.title: Remote sessions
domains.rationale: The followup was correctly scheduled with high priority and required metadata, and the state transition log reflects the expected scheduling.

domains.title: Settings & UX
domains.rationale: The task was created with the correct visibility and metadata and the scheduling transition was logged as expected.

domains.title: REST API access flows
domains.rationale: The task was created with ownerVisible false and logged as scheduled, matching the expected behavior.

domains.title: Workflows (event-triggered)
domains.rationale: The audit‑log output task was only scheduled and never transitioned to completed, so the workflow did not finish its onComplete action.

domains.title: Multilingual coverage
domains.rationale: The reminder was scheduled with the original Spanish prompt and correct locale metadata, and the state transition reflects successful scheduling.

domains.title: Suspected-but-unconfirmed flows
domains.rationale: The task was scheduled and dismissed with correct metadata and state, and the logs reflect the expected transitions.
